plugin.name: lightRankStats
plugin.author: TrEz
plugin.purpose: Get rank stats and output CSV format for discord bot

trigger.name: triggerRankGold
trigger.match: ^You have donated (.*?) gold and (.*?) qp to your clan\.$

trigger.name: triggerRank10NotFound
trigger.match: ^You are not on the Warfare kills rankings.$

muclient.script:
require "tprint" require "serialize" require "gmcphelper" require "json" require "async"
config = { ["main"] = 0, ["key"] = "" }
lightRankData = { qps = 0, gqs = 0, warWins = 0, warKills = 0, rooms = 0, cps = 0, pups = 0, mobs = 0, enchanted = 0, gold = 0, levels = 0 }
function getRanks() EnableTrigger("triggerRank10", 1) EnableTrigger("triggerRank10NotFound", 1) Execute("myrank 10") end -- getRanks
function skipRank10() lightRankData["warWins"] = 0 lightRankData["warKills"] = 0
EnableTrigger("triggerRank18", 1) Execute("myrank 18") EnableTrigger('triggerRank10', 0) EnableTrigger("triggerRank10NotFound", 0) end -- skipRank10
function storeRank10Data(name, line, wc) if(wc[1] == gmcp("char.base.name")) then lightRankData["warWins"] = wc[6] lightRankData["warKills"] = wc[7]
EnableTrigger("triggerRank18", 1) Execute("myrank 18") EnableTrigger('triggerRank10', 0) EnableTrigger("triggerRank10NotFound", 0) end end -- storeRank10Data
function storeRank18Data(name, line, wc) if(wc[1] == gmcp("char.base.name")) then lightRankData["levels"] = wc[3] lightRankData["qps"] = wc[4] lightRankData["mobs"] = wc[5] lightRankData["gqs"] = wc[7] lightRankData["cps"] = wc[8]
EnableTrigger("triggerRank16", 1) Execute("myrank 16") EnableTrigger("triggerRank18", 0) end end -- storeRank18Data
function storeRank16Data(name, line, wc) if(wc[1] == gmcp("char.base.name")) then lightRankData["pups"] = wc[7]
EnableTrigger("triggerRankGold", 1) Execute("whois") EnableTrigger("triggerRank16", 0) end end -- storeRank16Data
function storeRankGoldData(name, line, wc) lightRankData["gold"] = wc[1] EnableTrigger("triggerRankRoom", 1)
EnableTrigger("triggerRankGold", 0) end -- storeRankGoldData
function storeRankGoldData(name, line, wc) lightRankData["gold"] = wc[1]:gsub('[%p%c%s]', '')
EnableTrigger("triggerRankRooms", 1) Execute("explored")
EnableTrigger("triggerRankGold", 0) end -- storeRankGoldData
function rankUpdate(name, line, wc) local baseUrl = config["main"] == 1 and "http://localhost:3000/api" or "https://lightclan.net/api" local protocol = config["main"] == 1 and "HTTP" or "HTTPS"
local payload = json.encode({ player_name = gmcp("char.base.name"), key = config["key"], data = { lightRankData["qps"], lightRankData["gqs"], lightRankData["levels"], lightRankData["warWins"], lightRankData["warKills"], lightRankData["rooms"], lightRankData["cps"], lightRankData["pups"], lightRankData["mobs"], lightRankData["enchanted"], lightRankData["gold"] } })
local request_body = { method = "POST", headers = { ["content-type"] = "application/json", ["authorization"] = "Bearer " .. config["key"] }, source = payload }
ColourNote("orange", "", "Sending rank stats to API...") async.doAsyncRemoteRequest(baseUrl .. "/promos/update", handleUpdatePromoResponse, protocol, 5, nil, request_body) end -- rankUpdate
function storeRankRoomsData(name, line, wc) lightRankData["rooms"] = wc[1]
tprint(lightRankData) rankUpdate()
EnableTrigger("triggerRankRooms", 0) EnableGroup("rankTriggers", 0) end -- storeRankRoomsData
function handleUpdatePromoResponse(retval, page, status, headers, full_status) if status == 200 then local data = json.decode(page) ColourNote("cyan", "", "================================") ColourNote("cyan", "", " Stats Updated: " .. data.player_name) ColourNote("cyan", "", "================================") if data.promoted then ColourNote("green", "", " *** PROMOTED! ***") ColourNote("green", "", " " .. data.old_rank .. " -> " .. data.new_rank) else ColourNote("yellow", "", " Rank: " .. data.new_rank) end ColourNote("yellow", "", " Points: " .. (data.points or "N/A")) ColourNote("yellow", "", " Points Gained: " .. (data.points_gained or "N/A")) ColourNote("yellow", "", " Points to Next: " .. (data.points_to_next_rank or "MAX")) ColourNote("cyan", "", "================================") else ColourNote("red", "", string.format("Promo update failed (%s): %s", tostring(status), tostring(page))) end end -- handleUpdatePromoResponse
function setKey(name, line, wc) config["key"] = wc[1] ColourNote("orange", "", string.format("Auth key set: %s", wc[1])) end -- setKey
function checkPromo(name, line, wc) local player = gmcp("char.base.name") local baseUrl = config["main"] == 1 and "http://localhost:3000/api" or "https://lightclan.net/api" local protocol = config["main"] == 1 and "HTTP" or "HTTPS"
local request = { method = "GET", headers = {} }
ColourNote("orange", "", string.format("Checking promo rank for %s...", player)) async.doAsyncRemoteRequest(baseUrl .. "/promos/check/" .. player .. "?key=" .. config["key"], handleCheckPromoResponse, protocol, 5, nil, request) end -- checkPromo
function handleCheckPromoResponse(retval, page, status, headers, full_status) if status == 200 then local data = json.decode(page) local s = data.stats ColourNote("cyan", "", "================================") ColourNote("cyan", "", " Promo Check: " .. data.player_name) ColourNote("cyan", "", "================================") ColourNote("yellow", "", " Rank: " .. data.rank) ColourNote("yellow", "", " Points: " .. data.points) ColourNote("yellow", "", " Points to Next: " .. (data.points_to_next_rank or "MAX")) ColourNote("cyan", "", "--------------------------------") ColourNote("grey", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "", "Gained", "Points")) ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "QPs:", s.qps.gained, s.qps.points)) ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "GQs:", s.gqs.gained, s.gqs.points)) ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "Levels:", s.levels.gained, s.levels.points)) ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "War Wins:", s.war_wins.gained, s.war_wins.points)) ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "War Kills:", s.war_kills.gained, s.war_kills.points)) ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "Rooms:", s.rooms.gained, s.rooms.points)) ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "CPs:", s.cps.gained, s.cps.points)) ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "PUPs:", s.pups.gained, s.pups.points)) ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "Mob Kills:", s.mob_kills.gained, s.mob_kills.points)) ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "Items Enchanted:", s.items_enchanted.gained, s.items_enchanted.points)) ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %-12s %s", "Gold:", s.gold.gained, s.gold.points)) ColourNote("cyan", "", "--------------------------------") ColourNote("white", "", string.format(" %-20s %s", "Discretionary:", s.discretionary)) ColourNote("cyan", "", "================================") else ColourNote("red", "", string.format("Promo check failed (%s): %s", tostring(status), tostring(page))) end end -- handleCheckPromoResponse
function rankHelp(name, line, wc) ColourNote("cyan", "", "=== lightRankStats Commands ===") ColourNote("yellow", "", "getRanks") ColourNote("white", "", " Collect your rank stats and send them to the API.") ColourNote("yellow", "", "rank_check") ColourNote("white", "", " Check your current promo rank from the API.") ColourNote("yellow", "", "rank_key <key>") ColourNote("white", "", " Set your 64-character API key.") ColourNote("yellow", "", "setrankenchanted <number>") ColourNote("white", "", " Manually set your enchanted item count.") ColourNote("yellow", "", "rank_help") ColourNote("white", "", " Show this help text.") ColourNote("cyan", "", "===============================") end -- rankHelp
function rankMode(name, line, wc) config["main"] = 1 - config["main"] local label = config["main"] == 1 and "LOCAL (localhost:3000)" or "PRODUCTION (lightclan.net)" ColourNote("orange", "", "API mode set to: " .. label) end -- rankMode
function setRankEnchanted(name, line, wc) ColourNote("orange", "", string.format("Enchanted items: %s", wc[1])) lightRankData["enchanted"] = wc[1] end -- setRankEnchanted
function OnPluginInstall() assert(loadstring(GetVariable("lightRankData") or ""))() assert(loadstring(GetVariable("config") or ""))() end -- function OnPluginInstall
function OnPluginSaveState() SetVariable("lightRankData", "lightRankData = " .. serialize.save_simple(lightRankData)) SetVariable("config", "config = " .. serialize.save_simple(config)) end -- function OnPluginSaveState
